The '''Dantooinian creeper''' was a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Color/Legends|green]] [[Arthropod/Legends|arthropod]] indigenous to [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]].

==Behind the scenes==
This species was never canonically named.

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 3|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 3]] {{1st}}
